llm_verdict.message:
The remediation cannot be completed because the current user session is encountering a critical system error: `You are required to change your password immediately (password expired). Password change required but no TTY available.` 

This error is blocking all command execution, including `mkdir`, `id`, and even basic shell commands. Since I do not have a TTY to perform a password change and cannot execute any commands to reset the password or extend its validity, I am unable to proceed with the planned remediation. 

Please resolve the expired password issue for the execution user to allow the remediation to continue.
